basic_details.job_title: IAF Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 47 LDC, Hindi Typist & Driver Posts
basic_details.post_name: Lower Division Clerk (LDC), Hindi Typist, Civilian Mechanical Transport Driver – Ordinary Grade (CMTD)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026: Get the latest IAF recruitment notification 2026 for Group ‘C’ Civilian posts including Lower Division Clerk (LDC), Hindi Typist, and Civilian Mechanical Transport Driver vacancies across various Air Force Stations in India. The offline application process started with the publication in Employment News (2–8 May 2026) and the last date to apply is approximately 01 June 2026 (within 30 days from publication). Candidates can find Indian Air Force vacancies across India on the official website Indian Air Force indianairforce.nic.in. You can also

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 30 days from the date of publication of this advertisement in Employment News (i.e., 30 days from 02-05-2026)

age_limit.details: For Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026, the age limit for all posts is 18 to 25 years. The crucial date for determining the age limit is the last date of receipt of application. Age relaxation is applicable to candidates of reserved categories as per the prevailing Government instructions. SC/ST/OBC candidates applying against unreserved posts are not entitled to any relaxation in age limit. The category-wise age relaxation is provided in the table below.

qualification.details: Before applying for Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026, candidates must ensure they meet all the prescribed eligibility conditions including educational qualification, experience, and other requirements for the respective post. SC/ST/OBC candidates applying against unreserved posts are not entitled to any relaxation in age limit, experience, etc. OBC candidates must submit a certificate stating they do not belong to the creamy layer. The post-wise educational qualification and experience requirements are given below. | Nationality: Eligible Indian Citizens only. Punjabi/Regional Language: Not applicable; however, application forms must be typed in English/Hindi. PwBD Typing Exemption: As per DoPT OM No. 14020/1/2014-Estt. (D) dated 22 April 2015, PwBD candidates who are otherwise qualified to hold clerical posts and are certified as being unable to type may be exempted from the typing test subject to furnishing Medical Certificate in prescribed format as Annexure-II. | Post-wise Educational Qualification & Pay Scale

vacancy_details.Command / Unit: HQ South Western Air Command, IAF

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-2 as per Pay Matrix 7th CPC

selection_process: 1. Scrutiny of Applications Pre-scrutiny in terms of age limit, minimum qualification, documents and certificates by the respective unit before calling candidates for the written test
2. Written Test 100% weightage; Question cum answer paper will be in English and Hindi; there will be simultaneous conduct of test for all categories
3. Skill / Practical / Physical Test Qualifying in nature; required candidates shortlisted based on merit/category in written test will be called for this test
Lower Division Clerk (LDC) / Hindi Typist General Intelligence, English Language, Numerical Aptitude & General Awareness
Civilian Mechanical Transport Driver (CMTD) General Intelligence & Reasoning, Numerical Aptitude, General English, General Awareness and Trade/Post related questions
The selection process for Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026 involves scrutiny of applications
and skill/practical/physical test wherever applicable. All applications will be scrutinised in terms of age limit
documents and certificates. Eligible candidates will be issued call letters for the written test.

The written test will be based on minimum education qualification. Shortlisted candidates will then be called for skill/practical/physical test wherever applicable. Merely fulfilling basic selection criteria does not automatically entitle a person to be called for test. Selected candidates will be subject to "All India Service Liability". The detailed selection process is given below.
how_to_apply: The application process for Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Eligible candidates can apply to any of the Air Force Stations of their choice subject to the vacancies and qualifications. The application as per Annexure-I, duly supported with required documents, must reach the concerned Air Force Station as per choice within 30 days from the date of publication of this advertisement in Employment News/Rozgar Samachar. The step-by-step process to apply offline is given below.
Download and fill the Application Form as per the prescribed Proforma (Annexure-I) given in the advertisement. The application form must be filled/typed in English or Hindi.
Affix a recent passport-size self-attested photograph on the application form. Also attach two passport-size photographs (same as affixed on the form).

Attach self-attested copies of all documents in support of educational qualification, age, technical qualification, Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwBD) certificate (if applicable), experience certificate, and Caste Certificate issued by the competent civil authorities in case of SC/ST/OBC/EWS candidates.

In case of appointment of OBC candidates against reserved quota, their caste should be listed under Central List of OBCs. OBC candidates seeking reservation must submit a certificate to the effect that he/she does not belong to the creamy layer.
In case of ex-serviceman, a self-attested photocopy of the discharge book must be submitted along with the application.
EWS candidates must ensure that the Income & Asset Certificate is valid for Financial Year 2026-2027 (issued on the basis of income for Financial Year 2025-2026).
Attach a self-addressed envelope with stamps of Rs. 10/- pasted. Address should be typed in English/Hindi.
Mention clearly on the envelope: "APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF ________ AND CATEGORY ________"
Send the complete application by post to the concerned Air Force Station/Unit's postal address within 30 days from the date of publication of this advertisement.
Candidates intending to apply for more than one post must submit a separate application for each post.
important_instructions: Candidates are advised to read all instructions carefully before applying for Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026. Non-compliance with any of the instructions may result in rejection of the application. The Air Officer Commanding/Station Commander/Commanding Officer of the concerned Air Force Station has the right to reject any application without assigning any reason. The key instructions are listed below.

Applications received prior to the date of publication of this notification and after the closing date will not be entertained and will be rejected. IAF will not be held responsible for any postal delay. Separate application for each post should be forwarded. Mention clearly on the envelope "APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF _______ AND CATEGORY _______". All documents must be self-attested. Application form must be duly typed in English/Hindi with a recent passport-size photograph. SC/ST/OBC candidates applying against unreserved posts are not entitled to any relaxation in age limit, experience, etc. The option for scribe to PwBD candidates will be applicable as per DoPT OM No. 29-6/2019-DD-III dated 10 Aug 2022. PwBD candidates with temporary disability (falling under "likely to improve" category) as per Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment OM No. 18-25/2024-Policy dated 17 Dec 2025 are not eligible for reservation. Only "progressive, non-progressive or not likely to improve" PwBD candidates are eligible for reservation. There will be simultaneous conduct of test for all categories. The responsibility of deciding the category for which the candidate would like to appear will be the choice of the applicant himself. No separate exam will be conducted for candidates applying for more than one category if the exams are held on the same date. The Air Officer Commanding/Station Commander/Commanding Officer has the right to change the number of vacancies/reservation status at any Air Force Station at any time before selection. Selected candidates will be subject to "All India Service Liability". No TA/DA will be paid to attend the written test/skill/practical/physical test. Candidates must bring original certificates, copies of annexure attached with application, educational qualification/technical qualification and experience certificates at the time of skill/practical/physical test. The crucial date for determining validity of documents/certificates will be on or before the last date of receipt of application.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies have been announced for Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Indian Air Force has announced vacancies for Group C Civilian posts through Advertisement No. 01/2026 across various Air Force Stations/Units. The total number of vacancies is distributed across multiple commands: HQ Maintenance Command (14 posts), HQ Training Command (5 posts), HQ Central Air Command (3 posts), HQ Western Air Command (6 posts), HQ Eastern Air Command (6 posts), HQ South Western Air Command (5 posts), HQ Southern Air Command (1 post), and Independent Units (7 posts). The posts include Lower Division Clerk (LDC), Hindi Typist, and Civilian Mechanical Transport Driver - Ordinary Grade (CMTD).

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for IAF Group C Civilian posts?
faq.answer: For Lower Division Clerk (LDC) and Hindi Typist positions, candidates must have passed 12th Class from a recognised Board with typing speed of 35 wpm in English or 30 wpm in Hindi on computer (corresponding to 10500 KDPH/9000 KDPH on an average of 5 key depressions for each word). For Civilian Mechanical Transport Driver - Ordinary Grade (CMTD), candidates must have Matriculation pass or equivalent qualification from a recognised board or university, hold a valid Civil Driving Licence for light and heavy vehicles, possess professional skill in driving and knowledge of motor mechanism, and have minimum two years' experience in driving motor vehicles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is 18 to 25 years, calculated as on the last date of receipt of application. Age relaxation is provided for reserved categories: OBC candidates get 3 years relaxation (up to 28 years), SC/ST candidates get 5 years relaxation (up to 30 years), Persons with Disabilities (PwBD) get 10 years relaxation with additional 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC categories. Ex-Servicemen get relaxation for full period of continuous service in Armed Forces (minimum 6 months), and Departmental Employees can apply up to 40 years (45 years for SC/ST).

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for IAF Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026. However, candidates must attach a self-addressed envelope with stamps of Rs. 10/- pasted along with the application. The application process is completely offline and candidates need to send their applications by post to the concerned Air Force Station/Unit.

faq.question: Q5. What is the pay scale for IAF Group C Civilian posts?
faq.answer: All the Group C Civilian posts including Lower Division Clerk (LDC), Hindi Typist, and Civilian Mechanical Transport Driver - Ordinary Grade (CMTD) are placed at Level-2 as per Pay Matrix 7th CPC. This corresponds to a pay scale of Rs. 19,900 - Rs. 63,200 plus allowances as admissible. The exact salary depends on various allowances like Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA), and other applicable benefits.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly offline. Candidates must download and fill the Application Form as per the prescribed Proforma (Annexure-I) given in the advertisement, affix a recent passport-size self-attested photograph, attach self-attested copies of all required documents (educational qualification, age, caste certificate, PwBD certificate if applicable, experience certificate), attach a self-addressed envelope with Rs. 10/- stamps, and send the complete application by post to the concerned Air Force Station/Unit's postal address. The envelope must be superscribed clearly with "APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF AND CATEGORY ". Applications must reach within 30 days from the date of publication in Employment News (i.e., by approximately 01-06-2026).

faq.question: Q7. What is the last date to apply for IAF Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of application is 30 days from the date of publication of this advertisement in Employment News/Rozgar Samachar. Since the advertisement was published in Employment News dated 2-8 May 2026, the last date is approximately 01-06-2026. Applications received prior to the date of publication or after the closing date will not be entertained and will be rejected. IAF will not be held responsible for any postal delay.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves multiple stages: Stage 1 - Scrutiny of Applications based on age limit, minimum qualification, documents and certificates; Stage 2 - Written Test with 100% weightage (question cum answer paper in English and Hindi) covering General Intelligence, English Language, Numerical Aptitude & General Awareness for LDC/Hindi Typist, and additionally Trade/Post related questions for CMTD; Stage 3 - Skill/Practical/Physical Test which is qualifying in nature for shortlisted candidates based on merit in written test. Eligible candidates will be issued call letters for the written test, and there will be simultaneous conduct of test for all categories.
